w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Market research identifies 300K–400K micro-coaches in India currently using spreadsheets and WhatsApp with no SaaS option under $15/month. The existing

1,499/month sits above this gap. A client-count based pricing model closes this gap, captures the micro-coach entry market, and creates a natural land-and-expand motion as coaches grow their client base.
Core insight from market research: The $5–15/month micro-coach segment represents 300K–400K coaches.
No SaaS vendor currently offers true entry-tier automation at this price point.
2.99 Cr MRR at Starter pricing alone.
Land and expand: a coach who starts at Starter with 8 clients and grows to 18 clients
upgrades naturally to Basic without a sales conversation.
1.1 Why Client Count, Not Feature Count

Feature-gated pricing forces coaches to evaluate abstract capabilities they have not yet needed. Client-count pricing maps directly to a number every coach already tracks — how many clients they have. The upgrade moment is self-evident: when a coach hits the limit, they are by definition earning more revenue and can afford the next tier. No sales required.
GST invoice generation is not a feature — it is a trust signal. An Indian coach paying
999/month to a SaaS platform will immediately ask for a GST invoice for their business accounting. The absence of this makes
feel informal and untrustworthy regardless of how well the product works. It is a 2-hour build. It should ship with the first paying coach, not after.
and Picky Assist offer GST compliance. Global platforms (
My PT Hub) do not. Building it in Phase 1 closes a trust gap that global competitors cannot close quickly.
Entry point for micro-coaches. Land and expand.
check-ins — automated, every Sunday, in coach's name
payment onboarding — single link, intake + payment
invoice generation — auto-generated on every payment
webhook integration — client auto-created on payment
Monday summary (available on Basic and above)
check-in questions (available on Pro and above)
Growing coach. AI-powered insights every Monday.
Monday summary — Gemini-powered, delivered via WhatsApp
scoring — clients flagged as At Risk, Engaged, or Strong
insight — one specific weekly priority surfaced by AI
client history — full check-in and payment timeline
check-in questions (available on Pro and above)
Established coach. Full customisation and priority support.
check-in questions — up to 6 questions per program
-specific check-in templates — different questions per program type
renewal analytics — conversion rate, average renewal lag
Certification bodies, aggregator partners, multi-location coaches.
-location management — separate client lists per location
-label onboarding page — custom domain, coach's own branding
access — for certification body and aggregator integrations
WhatsApp template names — coach's own template branding
business review — revenue and retention analysis
Annual pricing strategy: 2 months free = 16.6% discount.
Prioritise monthly at launch — reduces commitment friction for first 50 beta coaches.
Introduce annual at Month 3 once retention data confirms coach satisfaction.

The upgrade journey is mechanical, not sales-driven. When a coach hits their client limit, the dashboard shows a clear upgrade prompt. No email sequences. No sales calls. The product enforces the upgrade moment.
Dashboard shows upgrade prompt. New client onboarding blocked until upgrade. 7-day grace period.
Same prompt. Coaching continues for existing clients. New onboarding blocked.
Same prompt. Studio pitch includes dedicated onboarding call.
Direct Studio pitch. White-label page + API access are the selling points.
Grace period: 7 days after limit hit before new onboarding is blocked.
Existing clients are never disrupted — only new onboarding is gated.
Downgrade: allowed at end of billing cycle. Client records retained for 90 days.
These changes are additive to the existing schema defined in PRD v2. No existing tables are modified. Three new tables and two new columns.
ALTER TABLE coaches ADD COLUMN plan TEXT DEFAULT 'trial'
-- Set automatically by application on plan change
UUID REFERENCES coaches(id) ON DELETE CASCADE NOT NULL,
plan TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (plan IN ('
-- optional: coach may not be GST registered
Required for Pro and Studio tiers — custom check-in questions per program.
UUID REFERENCES coaches(id) ON DELETE CASCADE NOT NULL,
ALTER TABLE subscriptions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
GST invoice generation fires automatically on every successful
payment. No manual action required from coach or client. The invoice is generated as a PDF, stored in
Storage, and delivered via email to both client and coach within 60 seconds of payment.
GST rate on coaching services: 18% (Education/Fitness services — confirm with compliance consultant).
Coach's own GST number is optional — many independent coaches are not GST registered under
Invoice is required regardless of whether coach has GST number. It is a payment receipt.
resets at start of each year)
logo + 'TAX INVOICE' label + Invoice number + Invoice date
Business name (or full name) + Address + GSTIN (if registered) + PAN (optional)
Full name + Email + GSTIN (if provided — most clients will not have one)
Program name + Duration + Amount before tax
payment ID + Payment method + Paid date
'This is a computer-generated invoice and does not require a signature.' +
/invoices -- List all GST invoices for coach
Use the @react-pdf/renderer library to generate invoice PDFs server-side inside a Next.js API route. Store the output in
}.pdf. Deliver via Resend to both client and coach.

Add a GST Details section to /dashboard/settings. Fields are optional but prompted on first payment. If coach does not fill these in, invoice generates with their profile name and a placeholder address.
Used as seller address on invoice
Every API route that creates a new client or
must check the coach's active client count against their plan limit before proceeding. This is the core enforcement mechanism for the client-count pricing model.
// 3. Check grace period (7 days after limit hit)
// Grace period logic: check when limit was first hit in subscriptions table
Check limit at these exact points — nowhere else:
order. Return 403 with upgrade message if over limit.
— before creating client record. If over limit and grace period expired: refund payment, send coach notification, do not create client.
Dashboard — show client count vs limit on every page load. Red warning at 80% of limit. Upgrade prompt at 100%.
Critical: never block an existing client's check-in, renewal, or AI summary due to plan limits.
Limits only apply to NEW client onboarding.
Existing clients are always served regardless of plan state.
// When coach hits limit — dashboard shows upgrade CTA
// 4. Send WhatsApp notification to coach confirming upgrade
/subscriptions/current -- Current plan, billing date, client count vs limit
/subscriptions/cancel -- Cancel at end of billing period
/coaches/billing -- Update GST number, business name, address
6.3 Check-in Template Routes (Pro and Studio only)
Add to /dashboard home page. Shows current plan, client count vs limit, days to next billing, and upgrade CTA when within 20% of limit.
Add /dashboard/invoices as a new navigation item. Lists all GST invoices with download links. Filterable by month. Shows total revenue collected this month.
Invoice list — month filter, download links, total amount
GST details — business name, GSTIN, address, PAN
8. Build Sequence — Additions to PRD v2
These tasks extend the 8-task Antigravity sequence defined in PRD v2. Run them in order, after the core 8 tasks complete.
with PLAN_LIMITS constants. Add limit check to POST /
: true if over limit. Add to
with all fields from Section 4.2. Create
webhook after payment record creation. Create GET /
status widget to /dashboard home page with upgrade CTA.
Create /dashboard/settings/billing page. Form: business name, GSTIN, billing address, PAN. Validate GSTIN format client-side. Save to
/invoices. Show invoice number, date, client name, amount, download link. Month filter. Total revenue summary at top.
-templates page. Gate behind plan check — return 403 for Starter and Basic. Wire template selection into weekly check-in
Conservative projections based on 50 beta coaches in Month 1 growing to 200 coaches by Month 6. These are internal planning numbers — not for investor use without validation.
Beta launch. Mix of Starter and Basic.
Word of mouth + certification body outreach.
First coaches upgrading from Starter to Basic.
First partnership converts a batch of coaches.
Pro tier coaches growing. Annual plan introduced.
34 Lakh ARR run rate. First Studio tier coaches.
Break-even: approximately Month 3 at 65 coaches covering infrastructure costs.
These projections assume no paid marketing — organic + partnership only.
